name: unikodo
description: Unicode (math) symbol completions via the unikodo LSP server

unikodo.serverPath.description: Path to the unikodo-lsp executable. If it is on your PATH, the default is fine.

unikodo.languages.description: Language IDs to enable completions for. Use ["*"] for all files.

unikodo.enabledSchemes.description: Naming schemes to offer completions from. Built-ins: "unicode-math", "typst", "ascii".

unikodo.includeAscii.description: Also offer names whose value is a single ASCII character (e.g. \lparen -> '(').

unikodo.prefixes.description: Per-scheme prefix overrides, e.g. {"typst": ";"}. Prefix schemes default to "\\".

unikodo.dedupe.description: Collapse identical completions (same name + character) from multiple schemes, keeping the first by enabledSchemes order.
